requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 240V / 50Hz / Type G (BS 1363) Plug Environment
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——240V / 50Hz / G型（BS 1363）插头环境
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——240V / 50Hz / G型（BS 1363）插頭環境

summary.en: Uganda operates on a 240V / 50Hz electrical system using Type G (BS 1363) British three-pin plugs and sockets. All mains-connected wireless and IoT devices must be designed, tested, and labelled for 240V / 50Hz operation and must be compatible with Type G sockets. Electrical safety must be demonstrated to IEC or UNBS-adopted standards (mirroring IEC 60950-1 or IEC 62368-1 for audio/video, IT, and communications equipment). Type G plug compliance (BS 1363) is required. Chinese devices designed for 220V / 50Hz with Type A or Type C plugs require plug and power supply adaptation and re-testing evidence for the Ugandan electrical environment.
summary.zh: 乌干达采用240V/50Hz电力系统，使用G型（BS 1363）英式三脚插头和插座。所有接主电源的无线及物联网设备须针对240V/50Hz运行进行设计、测试和标注，并须兼容G型插座。电气安全须符合IEC或UNBS采用的标准（参照IEC 60950-1或IEC 62368-1，适用于音视频、信息技术及通信设备）。需符合G型插头（BS 1363）标准。为220V/50Hz设计、使用A型或C型插头的中国设备须进行插头和电源适配及重新测试，以满足乌干达电气环境要求。
summary.zht: 烏干達採用240V/50Hz電力系統，使用G型（BS 1363）英式三腳插頭和插座。所有接主電源的無線及物聯網裝置須針對240V/50Hz運行進行設計、測試和標注，並須兼容G型插座。電氣安全須符合IEC或UNBS採用的標準（參照IEC 60950-1或IEC 62368-1，適用於音視頻、資訊技術及通訊設備）。需符合G型插頭（BS 1363）標準。為220V/50Hz設計、使用A型或C型插頭的中國設備須進行插頭和電源適配及重新測試，以滿足烏干達電氣環境要求。

standards_or_laws: UNBS standards mirroring IEC 62368-1 — Audio/Video, IT and Communications Equipment Safety (Uganda)
UNBS standards mirroring IEC 60950-1 — IT Equipment Safety (Uganda, legacy)
BS 1363 — Type G UK/Uganda Plug and Socket Standard

summary.en: China operates on 220V / 50Hz with Type A and Type C plugs. Electrical safety is certified under GB 4943.1 (IT equipment, aligned with IEC 60950-1) or GB/T 35392 (aligned with IEC 62368-1). CCC certification covers electrical safety for applicable product categories. Chinese devices are not designed for 240V / 50Hz Type G environments by default and require adaptation for Uganda.
summary.zh: 中国采用220V/50Hz电力系统，使用A型和C型插头。电气安全通过GB 4943.1（信息技术设备，与IEC 60950-1对齐）或GB/T 35392（与IEC 62368-1对齐）认证。CCC认证涵盖适用产品类别的电气安全。中国设备默认并非为240V/50Hz G型环境设计，在乌干达使用需进行适配。
summary.zht: 中國採用220V/50Hz電力系統，使用A型和C型插頭。電氣安全通過GB 4943.1（資訊技術設備，與IEC 60950-1對齊）或GB/T 35392（與IEC 62368-1對齊）認證。CCC認證涵蓋適用產品類別的電氣安全。中國設備默認並非為240V/50Hz G型環境設計，在烏干達使用需進行適配。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Safety of IT Equipment (China, aligned with IEC 60950-1)
GB/T 35392 — Safety of Audio/Video and IT Equipment (China, aligned with IEC 62368-1)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — Electrical safety in scope (China)

gap.en: Uganda uses 240V / 50Hz Type G (BS 1363) plugs. Chinese devices rated for 220V with Type A or C plugs require power supply redesign or adaption and retesting to IEC/UNBS safety standards for the 240V environment. Wide-input (100-240V) power supplies reduce but do not eliminate the gap — the plug type and safety test evidence for 240V must still be addressed. CCC safety certification is not recognised by UNBS or UCC.
gap.zh: 乌干达使用240V/50Hz G型（BS 1363）插头。额定220V、配A型或C型插头的中国设备需重新设计或适配电源，并根据IEC/UNBS安全标准针对240V环境重新测试。宽压（100-240V）电源可减少但不能消除差距——插头类型和240V安全测试证明仍需处理。CCC安全认证不被UNBS或UCC认可。
gap.zht: 烏干達使用240V/50Hz G型（BS 1363）插頭。額定220V、配A型或C型插頭的中國設備需重新設計或適配電源，並根據IEC/UNBS安全標準針對240V環境重新測試。寬壓（100-240V）電源可減少但不能消除差距——插頭類型和240V安全測試證明仍需處理。CCC安全認證不被UNBS或UCC認可。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uganda's 240V / 50Hz Type G (BS 1363) electrical environment requires adaptation of China-made devices rated for 220V with Type A or C plugs. Electrical safety must be demonstrated to IEC 62368-1 (or IEC 60950-1 for legacy products) as adopted by UNBS. CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised by UNBS or UCC. Wide-input power supplies reduce the voltage gap but plug type and 240V safety testing must still be addressed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌干达240V/50Hz G型（BS 1363）电气环境要求对额定220V、配A型或C型插头的中国设备进行适配。电气安全须符合UNBS采用的IEC 62368-1（或旧版产品适用的IEC 60950-1）标准。CCC电气安全认证不被UNBS或UCC认可。宽压电源可减少电压差距，但插头类型和240V安全测试仍须处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏干達240V/50Hz G型（BS 1363）電氣環境要求對額定220V、配A型或C型插頭的中國設備進行適配。電氣安全須符合UNBS採用的IEC 62368-1（或舊版產品適用的IEC 60950-1）標準。CCC電氣安全認證不被UNBS或UCC認可。寬壓電源可減少電壓差距，但插頭類型和240V安全測試仍須處理。
